title: kyllinga polyphylla var. elatior
intro: Kyllinga polyphylla var. elatior, also known as Kyllinga elatior, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Kyllinga polyphylla var. elatior is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
